blockers.description: URL param `src=` encodes hidden sources but name implies visible sources — should be renamed `hide=`
blockers.workaround: Rename in url-state.ts buildParams/parseParams and bee-atlas.ts _buildCurrentParams; one-line change

blockers.description: WABA checkbox label may need clarification or removal — 'spurious' mention needs follow-up
blockers.workaround: Confirm with user whether to remove or relabel

blockers.description: DET-01 sidebar inat_obs: prefix routing was just fixed in ca29dd2 — needs re-test to confirm fix is correct
blockers.workaround: Re-run npm test and visual verify the sidebar detail card

human_actions_pending.context: Current encoding stores hidden sources; name 'src' implies visible. 'hide' is more accurate. Small one-line rename in url-state.ts + bee-atlas.ts.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide: relabel or remove WABA checkbox in Sources filter row?
human_actions_pending.context: User flagged 'spurious' label — unclear if this means remove the checkbox or just update its label.

human_actions_pending.action: Visual re-test DET-01 after ca29dd2 inat_obs: routing fix
human_actions_pending.context: Fix is committed but not yet visually confirmed in browser.

decisions.decision: iNat obs merge into occurrences.parquet via int_combined ARM 3
decisions.rationale: Avoids duplicate frontend rendering paths; source discriminator used

decisions.decision: VALID_SOURCES declared at module scope in url-state.ts
decisions.rationale: Co-location with SourceKey type; empty hiddenSources treated as undefined to avoid phantom result.ui emission

decisions.decision: CC license gate for iNat obs images
decisions.rationale: row.license.toUpperCase().startsWith('CC') — case-insensitive null-safe check prevents rendering non-CC images
isProvisional -> _renderProvisional; source=inat_obs -> _renderInatObs; else -> _renderSampleOnly — iNat rows never silently fall to sample-only

next_action: Resolve the `src=` → `hide=` rename question with user, then re-run npm test and visual UAT focusing on DET-01 sidebar card
context_notes: Plans 01–06 all shipped and committed. Data pipeline also ran: 92,802 rows (48K Ecdysis + 44K iNat obs + 29 WABA) in public/data/. UAT is the only remaining gate for phase completion. The three open issues are minor but block the operator approval signal.
